repos.name: koala73/worldmonitor
repos.desc: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

repos.name: ruvnet/RuView
repos.desc: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

repos.name: ayghri/i-have-adhd
repos.desc: A skill for your coding agent to stop it from burying the answer. ADHD-friendly output.

repos.name: schollz/croc
repos.desc: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦

repos.name: likec4/likec4
repos.desc: Visualize, collaborate, and evolve the software architecture with always actual and live diagrams from your code

repos.name: chrislgarry/Apollo-11
repos.desc: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.

repos.name: jamiepine/voicebox
repos.desc: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

repos.name: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
repos.desc: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors

repos.name: shiyu-coder/Kronos
repos.desc: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

repos.name: ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills
repos.desc: A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows

repos.name: agegr/pi-web
repos.desc: Web UI for the pi coding agent

repos.name: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
repos.desc: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

repos.name: tirth8205/code-review-graph
repos.desc: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.

repos.name: dreamhunter2333/cloudflare_temp_email
repos.desc: CloudFlare free temp domain email 免费收发 临时域名邮箱 支持附件 IMAP SMTP TelegramBot

repos.name: DioxusLabs/dioxus
repos.desc: Fullstack app framework for web, desktop, and mobile.

repos.name: hyprwm/Hyprland
repos.desc: Hyprland is an independent, highly customizable, dynamic tiling Wayland compositor that doesn't sacrifice on its looks.

repos.name: Pumpkin-MC/Pumpkin
repos.desc: Empowering everyone to host fast and efficient Minecraft servers.

# 🍿 程序员今日吃瓜：worldmonitor 爆火，TypeScript 又双叒叕赢了

> 📅 2026-07-23  |  🔍 共收录 19 个热门项目

警告：以下内容可能导致大量 star 行为、clone 冲动以及「我也能做」的幻觉。请谨慎阅读 ⚠️

---

## 📊 今日统计

主力语言：**TypeScript**: 7 | **Python**: 6 | **Rust**: 3 | **Go**: 1 | **Assembly**: 1

> TypeScript 项目上榜。类型安全的快乐，只有写过 any 的人才能体会。
